changes.description: MeowConnect realtime closed state now displays as Sleeping.
changes.details: When Supabase closes the passive realtime listener, the header now shows Sleeping instead of Offline because on-demand uploads can still run when raid completions are synced.

changes.description: MeowConnect cloud failures are written to app logs.
changes.details: Actual MeowConnect cloud request failures and login-required states are now recorded in the integrated Settings > System logs for easier diagnostics.

changes.description: MeowConnect profile names now prefer whitelist names.
changes.details: Shared MeowConnect profiles now use the Discord whitelist display name when available instead of falling back to the raw Discord account name.

changes.description: Set-up guide now covers MeowConnect.
changes.details: The guide now includes selecting shared characters with the Connect toggle and waits on the MeowConnect consent step until terms are accepted.

changes.description: Set-up guide highlighting is less intrusive.
changes.details: Guide highlights now use a lighter outline without forcing highlighted UI above the page, reducing layout and scrolling glitches.

changes.description: MeowConnect now marks unsynced local sharing changes.
changes.details: Roster sharing changes, character order changes, dashboard visibility changes, gold earner changes, and raid/static setting changes now mark MeowConnect as having unsynced local changes until the next successful upload. Manual sync remains cooldown-limited.

changes.description: MeowConnect logs combine shared LOA Logs clears.
changes.details: When accepted friends clear the same raid together and LOA Logs records the same player list and fight time, MeowConnect now combines those clear logs and shows the involved profile icons together.

changes.description: Manual MeowConnect logs now keep separate raid gates.
changes.details: Manual completions for multiple gates on the same character, raid, difficulty, and source no longer collapse into one log entry. Gate 1 and Gate 2 can now appear separately.

changes.description: Raid Together now refreshes after friend data loads.
changes.details: The Raid Together comparison view now explicitly reacts to loaded friends, local snapshots, and remote snapshots so matching open runs appear without needing unrelated UI changes.

changes.description: Raid Together availability layout is more compact.
changes.details: The Availability view now removes the redundant All filter, adds visible-raid focus filters, stacks profiles inside each raid frame, and opens character details in an overlay so multiple selected raids can fit without horizontal scrolling.

changes.description: Raid Together now supports friend-set matching.
changes.details: The Together view now lets users select which accepted friends to compare and computes the shared open-run count across the whole selected group.

changes.description: MeowConnect favorites update inside availability overlays.
changes.details: Profile availability overlays now follow the recomputed raid data so favorite toggles and Favorites filtering update visually without closing the overlay.

changes.description: Shared LOA Logs clears infer friends from player lists.
changes.details: Encounter logs now match players_json names against local and accepted-friend rosters before grouping so clears can show everyone from the friend list who was in the run.

changes.description: MeowConnect toolbar aligns with raid frames.
changes.details: The MeowConnect title and Together tab controls now share the centered raid-board width so they line up with the first Availability raid frame.

changes.description: Availability raid focus supports multiple raids.
changes.details: The visible-raid focus buttons can now select more than one raid at a time instead of switching to only one focused raid.

changes.description: Favorites view shows favorite counts per member.
changes.details: When Favorites is active, member rows and overlays now show favorite counts such as 0 favorites and only list favorited characters.

changes.description: MeowConnect displays whitelist names consistently.
changes.details: Remote profiles, friend rows, sent friend requests, availability, logs, and Together matching now resolve Discord IDs against whitelist names instead of showing raw Discord display names.

changes.description: Shared LOA Logs clears dedupe by raid gate and party.
changes.details: Multiple uploaded perspectives of the same LOA Logs clear now collapse when they share the same raid gate and players_json list, even if their fight timestamps differ slightly.

changes.description: Optional RAT view added to To Do.
changes.details: A default-off System setting can add a frontend-only RAT roster button in To Do that shows non-gold characters from all rosters together without changing saved roster data.

changes.description: Split RAT To Do view removes RAT characters from normal roster views.
changes.details: When the optional RAT To Do view is enabled, non-gold characters are hidden from their normal To Do roster view and shown only in the frontend-only RAT view.

changes.description: MeowConnect availability overlay headers are clearer.
changes.details: Expanded profile overlays now show the raid name beside the profile image, with the profile name and availability details underneath for better readability.
